title: 벤치마크 하네스 + 얇은 웹 대시보드 + 하드 게이트

hard_gate.fail_closed_verified: mislabeled labelset -> selection 80% -> gate fails with a selection failure

labelset: login-fixture-v1: L1 viewer signin (pass), L2 wrong password (pass), L3 admin items (pass), L4 OTP/SMS (NOT automatable negative), L5 viewer-sees-admin (labeled FAIL, false-pass guard). Built from webtest-agent/samples/login_cases.xlsx cases + human labels.
dashboard: createDashboard fetch handler: GET /api/executions, GET /api/needs-review, POST /api/baseline/approve (200/400/404), GET / HTML run table — all tested at handler level.
live_integration_deferred: Benchmark runs against a DETERMINISTIC fixture model (fixture-model.ts). The identical labelset runs against the live docker fixture + real Chromium via BrowserPage in the environment-dependent integration step (needs docker + `playwright install chromium`). Plan G004 acceptance ('벤치마크 실행·게이트 통과') is met against the deterministic model; gate logic + metrics are proven.
